chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 772 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ يُصَلِّي اَلرَّجُلُ وَ فِي يَدِهِ خَاتَمُ حَدِيدٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.772 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"A man should not pray while wearing an iron ring."
